paths.name: @supabase/supabase-js
paths.message: Import domain repositories from @/lib/repository/* instead of the Supabase SDK directly.

paths.name: @/lib/repository/admin
paths.message: Service-role data access goes through @/lib/intents/server-batch only.

patterns.message: Import the wired repositories from @/lib/repository/{browser,server,admin} instead of the adapter directly.
